title: Chintoo 2: Khajinyachi Chittarkatha
overview: Chintoo 2: Khajinyachi Chittarkatha (transl. Chintoo 2: The Drawing Story of the Treasure) is a 2013 Indian Marathi-language children's adventure film directed by Shrirang Godbole and produced by Indian Magic Eye Motion Pictures. It is a sequel to the 2012 film Chintoo. The film stars Shubhankar Atre, Animesh Padhya, Ved Ravade, Nishant Bhavsar, Rumani Khare, and Nagesh Bhonsle. It was theatrically released on 18 April 2013.
